title: Azure Pipelines Visualizer Configuration
description: Configuration file for the Azure Pipelines Visualizer (apv.config.json).

$schema.description: Path or URL to this JSON schema.

cacheDir.description: Directory for the on-disk file cache. Relative paths are resolved from the working directory. Defaults to '~/.apv/cache/ado-file-cache'.

customTaskDocs.description: Map Azure Pipelines task names to custom documentation URLs. Keys can include a version suffix (e.g. 'TaskName@1') or omit it to match all versions.

additionalProperties.description: URL to the task's documentation page.

relatedProjectGroups.description: Groups of related Azure DevOps projects for cross-project pipeline trigger discovery. When viewing triggered pipelines for a commit, the extension searches all projects in the same group.

id.description: The Azure DevOps project ID (GUID). Found via /_apis/projects.

name.description: The Azure DevOps project name as it appears in the URL.
